general_facts: Application is a hardware inventory management system
Uses vanilla JS with a custom 'controller' library for the frontend
Primary database is currently Firebase Realtime Database (RTDB) via server.js

Architecture.A: Views are functional components returning an element and using a custom 'controller' for state/events.
Frontend uses src/lib/db/index.js which routes requests via adapters. Default is RestAdapter pointing to local server, configurable via VITE_DB_PROVIDER.

Deployment.A: Multi-stage Docker build: Node.js builder stage compiles assets, Nginx stage serves statics with SPA support.
